_meta.verification: All PMIDs confirmed via PubMed get_article_metadata (title + abstract); DOIs confirmed via OpenAlex openalex_get_work. PMIDs are confirmed through PubMed rather than OpenAlex, which returns DOIs, not PMIDs.
